name: YouTube Channel Browse
summary: Browse a YouTube channel's Videos or Playlists tab with a chosen sort.
description: List a channel's videos (sorted latest / popular / oldest) or its playlists. Given a channel handle like `@fireship` or a full channel URL, navigates to the right tab, applies the sort chip, and extracts the grid.

channel.description: Channel identifier. Accepts: `@handle`, `handle` (leading @ auto-added), a /@handle URL, a /channel/UC... URL, or a /c/name URL. The extractor resolves it to the correct canonical path for the chosen mode.

limit.description: Max items to return. Defaults to 30. Hard cap 60 because only the first grid page is loaded (no infinite scroll).

mode.description: What to return. `latest` (default) / `popular` / `oldest` return recent videos sorted accordingly. `playlists` returns the channel's Playlists tab.

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const raw=cleanArg(arg0);if(!raw)throw new Error('channel is required');const mRaw=cleanArg(arg1).toLowerCase();const mode=['latest','popular','oldest','playlists'].includes(mRaw)?mRaw:'latest';const tab=(mode==='playlists')?'playlists':'videos';let base='';if(/^https?:\/\//i.test(raw)){try{const u=new URL(raw);base=u.origin+u.pathname.replace(/\/(videos|playlists|shorts|about|home|featured|streams|community|posts)\/?$/,'');}catch{throw new Error('bad channel URL: '+raw);}}else if(raw.startsWith('@')){base='https://www.youtube.com/'+raw;}else if(/^UC[A-Za-z0-9_-]{10,}/.test(raw)){base='https://www.youtube.com/channel/'+raw;}else{base='https://www.youtube.com/@'+raw;}const target=base.replace(/\/$/,'')+'/'+tab;setTimeout(()=>window.location.assign(target),0);return{redirected:true,target,mode,tab};

steps.name: Resolve channel input and redirect to the right tab
Wait for grid (videos) or playlist lockups

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const mRaw=cleanArg(arg0).toLowerCase();const mode=['latest','popular','oldest','playlists'].includes(mRaw)?mRaw:'latest';const n=parseInt(cleanArg(arg1),10);const limit=Number.isFinite(n)&&n>0?Math.min(n,60):30;const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=(el)=>!!(el&&el instanceof Element&&el.getBoundingClientRect().width>0&&getComputedStyle(el).display!=='none');const readSelectedGridFirstId=()=>{const d2=window.ytInitialData;const tabs2=d2?.contents?.twoColumnBrowseResultsRenderer?.tabs||[];const sel2=tabs2.find(t=>t?.tabRenderer?.selected);const contents2=sel2?.tabRenderer?.content?.richGridRenderer?.contents||[];return contents2.find(c=>c?.richItemRenderer)?.richItemRenderer?.content?.lockupViewModel?.contentId||null;};let sort_applied=true;if(mode==='popular'||mode==='oldest'){const wanted=mode==='popular'?'popular':'oldest';const btns=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="tab"]')).filter(visible);const btn=btns.find(b=>norm(b.textContent||'').toLowerCase()===wanted);if(btn){const before=readSelectedGridFirstId();btn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});btn.click();let changed=false;for(let i=0;i<30;i++){await sleep(250);if(btn.getAttribute('aria-selected')==='true'){const cur=readSelectedGridFirstId();if(cur&&cur!==before){changed=true;break;}}}await sleep(800);sort_applied=(btn.getAttribute('aria-selected')==='true')&&changed;}else{sort_applied=false;}}await sleep(300);const d=window.ytInitialData||{};const phr=d?.header?.pageHeaderRenderer;const phvm=phr?.content?.pageHeaderViewModel;const headerTitle=phr?.pageTitle||phvm?.title?.dynamicTextViewModel?.text?.content||norm(document.querySelector('yt-dynamic-text-view-model h1, .page-header-view-model-wiz__page-title')?.textContent||'');const metaRows=phvm?.metadata?.contentMetadataViewModel?.metadataRows||[];const flatMeta=metaRows.flatMap(r=>(r?.metadataParts||[]).map(p=>p?.text?.content).filter(Boolean));let handle=flatMeta.find(x=>/^@/.test(x))||'';let subscribers=flatMeta.find(x=>/subscribers?/i.test(x))||'';if(!handle||!subscribers){const metaText=norm(document.querySelector('yt-content-metadata-view-model')?.textContent||'');if(!handle){const hm=metaText.match(/@[A-Za-z0-9._-]+/);handle=hm?hm[0]:'';}if(!subscribers){const sm=metaText.match(/([\d.,KMB]+)\s*subscribers?/i);subscribers=sm?sm[0]:'';}}const header={handle,title:headerTitle,subscribers,url:location.href};const tabsArr=d?.contents?.twoColumnBrowseResultsRenderer?.tabs||[];const sel=tabsArr.find(t=>t?.tabRenderer?.selected);const items=[];if(mode==='playlists'){const sections=sel?.tabRenderer?.content?.sectionListRenderer?.contents||[];for(const sec of sections){const inner=sec?.itemSectionRenderer?.contents||[];for(const c of inner){const gridItems=c?.gridRenderer?.items||c?.richGridRenderer?.contents||[];for(const g of gridItems){if(items.length>=limit)break;const lvm=g?.lockupViewModel||g?.richItemRenderer?.content?.lockupViewModel;if(!lvm)continue;if(lvm.contentType&&!/PLAYLIST/.test(lvm.contentType))continue;const pid=lvm.contentId;if(!pid)continue;const title=lvm.metadata?.lockupMetadataViewModel?.title?.content||'';const collection=lvm.contentImage?.collectionThumbnailViewModel?.primaryThumbnail?.thumbnailViewModel;const overlaysC=collection?.overlays||lvm.contentImage?.thumbnailViewModel?.overlays||[];let video_count='';for(const o of overlaysC){const b=o?.thumbnailBottomOverlayViewModel?.badges?.[0]?.thumbnailBadgeViewModel?.text||o?.thumbnailOverlayBadgeViewModel?.thumbnailBadges?.[0]?.thumbnailBadgeViewModel?.text;if(b){video_count=b;break;}}items.push({playlist_id:pid,title,url:'https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list='+pid,video_count});}}}}else{const contents=sel?.tabRenderer?.content?.richGridRenderer?.contents||[];for(const c of contents){if(items.length>=limit)break;const lvm=c?.richItemRenderer?.content?.lockupViewModel;if(lvm){if(lvm.contentType&&!/VIDEO/.test(lvm.contentType))continue;const vid=lvm.contentId;if(!vid)continue;const title=lvm.metadata?.lockupMetadataViewModel?.title?.content||'';const rows=lvm.metadata?.lockupMetadataViewModel?.metadata?.contentMetadataViewModel?.metadataRows||[];const parts=rows.flatMap(r=>(r?.metadataParts||[]).map(p=>p?.text?.content).filter(Boolean));const views=parts.find(x=>/view/i.test(x))||'';const published=parts.find(x=>/ago|streamed|premier|scheduled/i.test(x))||'';const overlays=lvm.contentImage?.thumbnailViewModel?.overlays||[];let duration='';for(const o of overlays){const b=o?.thumbnailBottomOverlayViewModel?.badges?.[0]?.thumbnailBadgeViewModel?.text;if(b){duration=b;break;}}items.push({video_id:vid,title,url:'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v='+vid,duration,views,published});continue;}const vr=c?.richItemRenderer?.content?.videoRenderer;if(vr){const vid=vr.videoId;if(!vid)continue;const title=vr.title?.runs?.[0]?.text||vr.title?.simpleText||'';const views=vr.viewCountText?.simpleText||vr.shortViewCountText?.simpleText||'';const published=vr.publishedTimeText?.simpleText||'';const duration=vr.lengthText?.simpleText||(vr.thumbnailOverlays||[]).find(o=>o.thumbnailOverlayTimeStatusRenderer)?.thumbnailOverlayTimeStatusRenderer?.text?.simpleText||'';items.push({video_id:vid,title,url:'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v='+vid,duration,views,published});}}}return{channel:header,mode,sort_applied,returned_count:items.length,items};

steps.name: Apply sort chip (videos modes) and extract

help.summary: Browse a YouTube channel's Videos or Playlists tab with a chosen sort.

parameters.channel: Channel identifier. Accepts: `@handle`, `handle` (leading @ auto-added), a /@handle URL, a /channel/UC... URL, or a /c/name URL. The extractor resolves it to the correct canonical path for the chosen mode.
parameters.limit: Max items to return. Defaults to 30 for videos, 30 for playlists. Hard cap 60 because only the first grid page is loaded (no infinite scroll).
parameters.mode: What to return. `latest` (default) / `popular` / `oldest` return recent videos sorted accordingly. `playlists` returns the channel's Playlists tab.

examples.command: rzn-browser run youtube channel --param channel="@fireship" --param mode=latest --param limit=10

examples.description: Top 5 most popular videos on a channel
examples.command: rzn-browser run youtube channel --param channel="@fireship" --param mode=popular --param limit=5
rzn-browser run youtube channel --param channel="@fireship" --param mode=playlists

returns: { channel:{ handle, title, subscribers, url }, mode, returned_count, items:[...] }. For video modes items are { video_id, title, url, duration, views, published }. For playlists mode items are { playlist_id, title, url, video_count }.
notes: Sort chips (Latest/Popular/Oldest) are clicked client-side. If YouTube A/B tests the chip UI away, the workflow falls back to Latest and sets `sort_applied: false` in the response so callers can detect drift. YouTube occasionally ignores a Popular-sort request in automated sessions and returns the Latest ordering even when `aria-selected` flips to Popular — if strict popular ranking matters, re-run or cross-check against view_count.
Only the first grid page is returned. For deep backlogs ask for a dedicated paginating workflow.
Shorts tab is intentionally not a mode. If needed, pass the full `/@handle/shorts` URL as `channel` — the resolver will respect the explicit path.
For a video's comments/recommendations use `youtube video`. For playlist contents use `youtube playlist`.
